from celery import shared_task
from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class OrderParams:
    user_id: int
    timezone: str
    locale: str


@shared_task
def process_order_background(params: OrderParams):
    order = create_order(params)
    send_confirmation_email(order)
    return order.id


def handle_order_request(order_data: dict):
    timezone = get_user_timezone(order_data["user_id"])
    locale = get_user_locale(order_data["user_id"])
    params = OrderParams(
        user_id=order_data["user_id"],
        timezone=timezone,
        locale=locale,
    )
    process_order_background.delay(params)


@shared_task
def generate_report_for_user(user_id: int, filters: dict):
    permissions = get_user_permissions(user_id)
    report = build_report(filters, permissions)
    return report.id
